notes: Data is scraped from page payloads exposed by slaythespire2.gg.
Both English and Chinese localized pages are scraped and merged by stable ids when available.
Encounter pools are grouped by act and tier, which is more stable than literal floor-by-floor map paths.
Text markup like [gold] and color tags is normalized into plain text for model consumption.

relics.description_zh: 拾起时，失去所有金币，并从2个卡牌包中选择1包加入你的牌组。

relics.name: Sea Glass
relics.description: See 15 cards from another character. Choose any number of them to add to your Deck.
relics.description_en: See 15 cards from another character. Choose any number of them to add to your Deck.
relics.description_zh: 查看15张来自其他角色的牌。从中选择任意数量的卡牌加入你的牌组。

relics.name: Seal of Gold
relics.description: At the start of your turn, spend 5 Gold to gain [energy:1].
relics.description_en: At the start of your turn, spend 5 Gold to gain [energy:1].
relics.description_zh: 在你的回合开始时，花费5金币来获得[energy:1]。

relics.name: Self-Forming Clay
relics.description: Whenever you lose HP in combat, gain 3 Block next turn.
relics.description_en: Whenever you lose HP in combat, gain 3 Block next turn.
relics.description_zh: 每当你在战斗中失去生命，就在下回合获得3点格挡。

relics.name: Sere Talon
relics.description: Upon pickup, add 2 random Curses and 3 Wishes to your Deck.
relics.description_en: Upon pickup, add 2 random Curses and 3 Wishes to your Deck.
relics.description_zh: 拾起时，将2张随机诅咒牌和3张许愿加入你的牌组。

relics.name: Shovel
relics.description: You can now dig at Rest Sites to obtain a random Relic.
relics.description_en: You can now dig at Rest Sites to obtain a random Relic.
relics.description_zh: 现在你可以在休息处挖掘遗物。

relics.name: Shuriken
relics.description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Strength.
relics.description_en: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Strength.
relics.description_zh: 你每在同一回合内打出3张攻击牌，获得1点力量。

relics.name: Signet Ring
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain 999 Gold.
relics.description_en: Upon pickup, gain 999 Gold.
relics.description_zh: 拾起时，获得999金币。

relics.name: Silver Crucible
relics.description: The first 3 card rewards you see are Upgraded. The first Treasure Chest you open is empty.
relics.description_en: The first 3 card rewards you see are Upgraded. The first Treasure Chest you open is empty.
relics.description_zh: 你遇到的前3次卡牌奖励将是被升级过的。你打开的第一个宝箱将是空的

relics.name: Sling of Courage
relics.description: Start each Elite combat with 2 Strength.
relics.description_en: Start each Elite combat with 2 Strength.
relics.description_zh: 在与精英敌人战斗时，获得2点力量。

relics.name: Small Capsule
relics.description: Upon pickup, obtain a random Relic.
relics.description_en: Upon pickup, obtain a random Relic.
relics.description_zh: 拾起时，获得一件随机遗物。

relics.name: Snecko Eye
relics.description: At the start of your turn, draw 2 additional cards. Start each combat Confused.
relics.description_en: At the start of your turn, draw 2 additional cards. Start each combat Confused.
relics.description_zh: 每回合多抽2张牌。每场战斗开始时获得混乱效果。

relics.name: Snecko Skull
relics.description: Whenever you apply Poison, apply an additional 1 Poison.
relics.description_en: Whenever you apply Poison, apply an additional 1 Poison.
relics.description_zh: 每当你给予敌人中毒时，所给予的中毒层数增加1层。

relics.name: Sozu
relics.description: Gain [energy:1] at the start of each turn. You can no longer obtain potions.
relics.description_en: Gain [energy:1] at the start of each turn. You can no longer obtain potions.
relics.description_zh: 你无法再获得药水。在每回合开始时获得[energy:1]。

relics.name: Sparkling Rouge
relics.description: At the start of your 3rd turn, gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity.
relics.description_en: At the start of your 3rd turn, gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity.
relics.description_zh: 在你的第3回合开始时，获得1点力量和1点敏捷。

relics.name: Spiked Gauntlets
relics.description: Gain [energy:1] at the start of each turn. Powers cost 1 more [energy:1].
relics.description_en: Gain [energy:1] at the start of each turn. Powers cost 1 more [energy:1].
relics.description_zh: 在每回合开始时获得[energy:1]。能力牌的耗能增加1[energy:1]。

relics.name: Stone Calendar
relics.description: At the end of turn 7, deal 52 damage to ALL enemies.
relics.description_en: At the end of turn 7, deal 52 damage to ALL enemies.
relics.description_zh: 在第7回合结束时，对所有敌人造成52点伤害。

relics.name: Stone Cracker
relics.description: At the start of each combat, Upgrade 2 random cards in your Draw Pile for the rest of combat.
relics.description_en: At the start of each combat, Upgrade 2 random cards in your Draw Pile for the rest of combat.
relics.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，在本场战斗中随机升级你抽牌堆中的2张牌。

relics.name: Stone Humidifier
relics.description: Whenever you Rest at a Rest Site, raise your Max HP by 5.
relics.description_en: Whenever you Rest at a Rest Site, raise your Max HP by 5.
relics.description_zh: 每当你在休息处休息时，将你的最大生命值提升5点。

relics.name: Storybook
relics.description: Upon pickup, add 1 Brightest Flame to your Deck.
relics.description_en: Upon pickup, add 1 Brightest Flame to your Deck.
relics.description_zh: 拾起时，将1张至亮之焰添加到你的牌组中。

relics.name: Strawberry
relics.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 7.
relics.description_en: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 7.
relics.description_zh: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升7。

relics.name: Strike Dummy
relics.description: Cards containing “Strike” deal 3 additional damage.
relics.description_en: Cards containing “Strike” deal 3 additional damage.
relics.description_zh: 名字中有“打击”的卡牌造成3点额外伤害。

relics.name: Sturdy Clamp
relics.description: Up to 10 Block persists across turns.
relics.description_en: Up to 10 Block persists across turns.
relics.description_zh: 可以跨回合保留最多10点格挡。

relics.name: Sword of Jade
relics.description: Start each combat with 3 Strength.
relics.description_en: Start each combat with 3 Strength.
relics.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得3点力量。

relics.name: Sword of Stone
relics.description: Transforms into a powerful Relic after defeating 5 Elites.
relics.description_en: Transforms into a powerful Relic after defeating 5 Elites.
relics.description_zh: 在击败5名精英敌人之后将变化为一件强力遗物。

relics.name: Symbiotic Virus
relics.description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Dark.
relics.description_en: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Dark.
relics.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，生成1个黑暗充能球。

relics.name: Tanx's Whistle
relics.description: Upon pickup, add 1 Whistle to your Deck.
relics.description_en: Upon pickup, add 1 Whistle to your Deck.
relics.description_zh: 拾起时，将1张吹哨加入你的牌组。

relics.name: Tea of Discourtesy
relics.description: At the start of the next combat, shuffle 2 Dazed into your Draw Pile.
relics.description_en: At the start of the next combat, shuffle 2 Dazed into your Draw Pile.
relics.description_zh: 在下一场战斗开始时，将2张晕眩放入你的抽牌堆。

relics.name: The Abacus
relics.description: Whenever you shuffle your Draw Pile, gain 6 Block.
relics.description_en: Whenever you shuffle your Draw Pile, gain 6 Block.
relics.description_zh: 你每次将抽牌堆洗牌时，获得6点格挡。

relics.name: The Boot
relics.description: Whenever you would deal 4 or less unblocked attack damage, increase it to 5.
relics.description_en: Whenever you would deal 4 or less unblocked attack damage, increase it to 5.
relics.description_zh: 每当你造成小于等于4点未被格挡的攻击伤害时，将伤害提升为5。

relics.name: The Courier
relics.description: The merchant no longer runs out of cards, relics, or potions and his prices are reduced by 20%.
relics.description_en: The merchant no longer runs out of cards, relics, or potions and his prices are reduced by 20%.
relics.description_zh: 商人的卡牌、遗物和药水不再会卖光，并且所有商品打折20%。

relics.name: Throwing Axe
relics.description: The first card you play each combat is played an extra time.
relics.description_en: The first card you play each combat is played an extra time.
relics.description_zh: 你在每场战斗中打出的第一张牌会多打出一次。

relics.name: Tingsha
relics.description: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, deal 3 damage to a random enemy for each card discarded.
relics.description_en: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, deal 3 damage to a random enemy for each card discarded.
relics.description_zh: 你每在你的回合丢弃一张牌，就对一名随机敌人造成3点伤害。

relics.name: Tiny Mailbox
relics.description: Whenever you Rest, procure 2 random potions.
relics.description_en: Whenever you Rest, procure 2 random potions.
relics.description_zh: 每当你休息时，获得2瓶随机药水。

relics.name: Toasty Mittens
relics.description: At the start of your turn, Exhaust the top card of your Draw Pile and gain 1 Strength.
relics.description_en: At the start of your turn, Exhaust the top card of your Draw Pile and gain 1 Strength.
relics.description_zh: 在你的回合开始时，消耗你抽牌堆顶部的牌并获得1点力量。

relics.name: Toolbox
relics.description: At the start of each combat, choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards and add the chosen card into your Hand.
relics.description_en: At the start of each combat, choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards and add the chosen card into your Hand.
relics.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，从3张随机无色牌中选择1张加入你的手牌。

relics.name: Touch of Orobas
relics.description: Upon pickup, replace your starter Relic with an Ancient version.
relics.description_en: Upon pickup, replace your starter Relic with an Ancient version.
relics.description_zh: 拾起时，将你的初始遗物替换为先古版本。

relics.name: Tough Bandages
relics.description: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, gain 3 Block.
relics.description_en: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, gain 3 Block.
relics.description_zh: 你每在你的回合丢弃一张牌，就获得3点格挡。

relics.name: Toxic Egg
relics.description: Whenever you add a Skill into your Deck, Upgrade it.
relics.description_en: Whenever you add a Skill into your Deck, Upgrade it.
relics.description_zh: 每当你获得技能牌时，将其升级。

relics.name: Toy Box
relics.description: Upon pickup, obtain 4 Wax Relics. Every 3 combats, your left-most Wax Relic will melt away.
relics.description_en: Upon pickup, obtain 4 Wax Relics. Every 3 combats, your left-most Wax Relic will melt away.
relics.description_zh: 拾起时，获得4件蜡制遗物。每经过3场战斗，你最左侧的蜡制遗物将会融化。

relics.name: Tri-Boomerang
relics.description: Choose 3 Attacks in your Deck. Enchant them with Instinct.
relics.description_en: Choose 3 Attacks in your Deck. Enchant them with Instinct.
relics.description_zh: 从你的牌组中选择3张攻击牌。为这些牌附魔：本能。

relics.name: Tungsten Rod
relics.description: Whenever you would lose HP, lose 1 less.
relics.description_en: Whenever you would lose HP, lose 1 less.
relics.description_zh: 你每次失去生命时，减少失去的生命值1点。

relics.name: Tuning Fork
relics.description: Every time you play 10 Skills, gain 7 Block.
relics.description_en: Every time you play 10 Skills, gain 7 Block.
relics.description_zh: 你每打出10张技能牌，获得7点格挡。

relics.name: Twisted Funnel
relics.description: At the start of each combat, apply 4 Poison to ALL enemies.
relics.description_en: At the start of each combat, apply 4 Poison to ALL enemies.
relics.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，给予所有敌人4层中毒。

relics.name: Unceasing Top
relics.description: Whenever you have no cards in Hand during your turn, draw a card.
relics.description_en: Whenever you have no cards in Hand during your turn, draw a card.
relics.description_zh: 在你的回合，当你没有手牌时，抽一张牌。

relics.name: Undying Sigil
relics.description: Enemies with at least as much Doom as HP deal 50% less damage.
relics.description_en: Enemies with at least as much Doom as HP deal 50% less damage.
relics.description_zh: 当敌人的灾厄层数大于等于其生命值时，它造成的伤害降低50%。

relics.name: Unsettling Lamp
relics.description: Each combat, the first time you play a card that Debuffs an enemy, double its effect.
relics.description_en: Each combat, the first time you play a card that Debuffs an enemy, double its effect.
relics.description_zh: 你在每场战斗中第一次打出能给予敌人负面状态的牌时，将其效果翻倍。

relics.name: Vajra
relics.description: Start each combat with 1 Strength.
relics.description_en: Start each combat with 1 Strength.
relics.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得1点力量。

relics.name: Vambrace
relics.description: The first time you gain Block from a card each combat, double the amount gained.
relics.description_en: The first time you gain Block from a card each combat, double the amount gained.
relics.description_zh: 每场战斗中，你第一次从卡牌中获得的格挡值翻倍。

relics.name: Velvet Choker
relics.description: Gain [energy:1] at the start of each turn. You cannot play more than 6 cards per turn.
relics.description_en: Gain [energy:1] at the start of each turn. You cannot play more than 6 cards per turn.
relics.description_zh: 在每回合开始时获得[energy:1]。你每回合不能打出超过6张牌。

relics.name: Venerable Tea Set
relics.description: Whenever you enter a Rest Site, start the next combat with an additional [energy:2].
relics.description_en: Whenever you enter a Rest Site, start the next combat with an additional [energy:2].
relics.description_zh: 到达休息处后的下一场战斗开始时额外获得[energy:2]。

relics.name: Very Hot Cocoa
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [energy:4].
relics.description_en: Start each combat with an additional [energy:4].
relics.description_zh: 在每场战斗的第一回合额外获得[energy:4]。

relics.name: Vexing Puzzlebox
relics.description: At the start of each combat, add a random card into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.
relics.description_en: At the start of each combat, add a random card into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.
relics.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，将一张随机卡牌加入你的手牌。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。

relics.name: Vine Bracelet
relics.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 5.
relics.description_en: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 5.
relics.description_zh: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升5。

relics.name: Vitruvian Minion
relics.description: Cards containing “Minion” deal double damage and gain double Block.
relics.description_en: Cards containing “Minion” deal double damage and gain double Block.
relics.description_zh: 名字中有“仆从”的卡牌造成双倍的伤害与格挡。

relics.name: War Hammer
relics.description: Whenever you kill an Elite, Upgrade 4 random cards.
relics.description_en: Whenever you kill an Elite, Upgrade 4 random cards.
relics.description_zh: 每当你击败一名精英敌人的时候，随机升级4张牌。

relics.name: War Paint
relics.description: Upon pickup, Upgrade 2 random Skills.
relics.description_en: Upon pickup, Upgrade 2 random Skills.
relics.description_zh: 拾起时，随机升级2张技能牌。

relics.name: Whetstone
relics.description: Upon pickup, Upgrade 2 random Attacks.
relics.description_en: Upon pickup, Upgrade 2 random Attacks.
relics.description_zh: 拾起时，随机升级2张攻击牌。

relics.name: Whispering Earring
relics.description: Gain [energy:1] at the start of each turn. Vakuu plays your first turn for you.
relics.description_en: Gain [energy:1] at the start of each turn. Vakuu plays your first turn for you.
relics.description_zh: 在每个回合开始时，获得[energy:1]。瓦库将接管你的第一回合。

relics.name: White Beast Statue
relics.description: Potions always appear in combat rewards.
relics.description_en: Potions always appear in combat rewards.
relics.description_zh: 战斗结束后必定掉落药水。

relics.name: White Star
relics.description: Elites drop an additional Rare card reward.
relics.description_en: Elites drop an additional Rare card reward.
relics.description_zh: 精英敌人额外掉落一次稀有卡牌奖励。

relics.name: Wing Charm
relics.description: A random card in each card reward is Enchanted with Swift 1.
relics.description_en: A random card in each card reward is Enchanted with Swift 1.
relics.description_zh: 每次卡牌奖励中，都会有随机一张牌被附魔：迅捷1。

relics.name: Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge
relics.description: Does nothing.
relics.description_en: Does nothing.
relics.description_zh: 没有任何作用。

relics.name: Wongo's Mystery Ticket
relics.description: Receive 3 random Relics after 5 combats.
relics.description_en: Receive 3 random Relics after 5 combats.
relics.description_zh: 在5场战斗后，获得随机3件遗物。

relics.name: Yummy Cookie
relics.description: Upon pickup, Upgrade 4 cards.
relics.description_en: Upon pickup, Upgrade 4 cards.
relics.description_zh: 拾起时，升级4张牌。

potions.name: Ashwater
potions.description: Exhaust any number of cards in your Hand.
potions.description_en: Exhaust any number of cards in your Hand.
potions.description_zh: 消耗你手牌中的任意张牌。

potions.name: Attack Potion
potions.description: Choose 1 of 3 random Attack cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.
potions.description_en: Choose 1 of 3 random Attack cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.
potions.description_zh: 从3张随机攻击牌中选择1张加入你的手牌。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。

potions.name: Beetle Juice

potions.description_en: Enemy's attacks deal 30% less damage for the next 4 turns.
potions.description_zh: 敌人的攻击在下4个回合中造成的伤害减少30%。

potions.name: Blessing of the Forge
potions.description: Upgrade all cards in your Hand for the rest of combat.
potions.description_en: Upgrade all cards in your Hand for the rest of combat.
potions.description_zh: 在本场战斗中升级你手牌中的所有牌。

potions.name: Block Potion
potions.description: Gain 12 Block.
potions.description_en: Gain 12 Block.
potions.description_zh: 获得12点格挡。

potions.name: Blood Potion
potions.description: Heal for 20% of your Max HP.
potions.description_en: Heal for 20% of your Max HP.
potions.description_zh: 回复你最大生命值的20%。

potions.name: Bone Brew
potions.description: Summon 15.
potions.description_en: Summon 15.
potions.description_zh: 召唤15。

potions.name: Bottled Potential
potions.description: Shuffle ALL your cards into your Draw Pile. Draw 5 cards.
potions.description_en: Shuffle ALL your cards into your Draw Pile. Draw 5 cards.
potions.description_zh: 将你的所有牌洗入你的抽牌堆。抽5张牌。

potions.name: Clarity Extract
potions.description: Draw 1 card. At the start of your next 3 turns, draw 1 additional card.
potions.description_en: Draw 1 card. At the start of your next 3 turns, draw 1 additional card.
potions.description_zh: 抽1张牌。在你的下3个回合开始时，额外抽1张牌。

potions.name: Colorless Potion
potions.description: Choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.
potions.description_en: Choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.
potions.description_zh: 从3张随机无色牌中选择1张加入你的手牌。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。

potions.name: Cosmic Concoction
potions.description: Add 3 Upgraded Colorless cards into your Hand.
potions.description_en: Add 3 Upgraded Colorless cards into your Hand.
potions.description_zh: 将3张升级的无色牌加入你的手牌。

potions.name: Cunning Potion
potions.description: Add 3 Upgraded Shivs into your Hand.
potions.description_en: Add 3 Upgraded Shivs into your Hand.
potions.description_zh: 将3张小刀+加入你的手牌。

potions.name: Cure All
potions.description: Gain [energy:1]. Draw 2 cards.
potions.description_en: Gain [energy:1]. Draw 2 cards.
potions.description_zh: 获得[energy:1]。抽2张牌。

potions.name: Deprecated Potion
potions.description: This potion has been removed from the game.
potions.description_en: This potion has been removed from the game.
potions.description_zh: 这瓶药水已经从游戏中移除。

potions.name: Dexterity Potion
potions.description: Gain 2 Dexterity.
potions.description_en: Gain 2 Dexterity.
potions.description_zh: 获得2点敏捷。

potions.name: Distilled Chaos
potions.description: Play the top 3 cards of your Draw Pile.
potions.description_en: Play the top 3 cards of your Draw Pile.
potions.description_zh: 打出你抽牌堆顶部的3张牌。

potions.name: Droplet of Precognition
potions.description: Choose a card in your Draw Pile and add it into your Hand.
potions.description_en: Choose a card in your Draw Pile and add it into your Hand.
potions.description_zh: 选择你抽牌堆中的一张牌加入你的手牌。

potions.name: Duplicator

potions.description_en: This turn, your next card is played an extra time.
potions.description_zh: 本回合，你打出的下一张牌会额外打出一次。

potions.name: Energy Potion
potions.description: Gain [energy:2].
potions.description_en: Gain [energy:2].
potions.description_zh: 获得[energy:2]。

potions.name: Entropic Brew
potions.description: Fill all your empty potion slots with random potions.
potions.description_en: Fill all your empty potion slots with random potions.
potions.description_zh: 在所有空药水栏位中获得随机药水。

potions.name: Essence of Darkness
potions.description: Channel a Dark for each of your Orb Slots.
potions.description_en: Channel a Dark for each of your Orb Slots.
potions.description_zh: 生成你充能球栏位数量个黑暗充能球。

potions.description_en: Deal 10 damage to ALL enemies.

potions.name: Fairy in a Bottle
potions.description: When your HP would be reduced to 0, instead this potion is discarded and you heal to 30% of your Max HP.
potions.description_en: When your HP would be reduced to 0, instead this potion is discarded and you heal to 30% of your Max HP.
potions.description_zh: 当你的生命值将被减少至0或以下时，改为丢弃这瓶药水，然后将你回复到你最大生命值的30%。

potions.name: Fire Potion

potions.description_en: Deal 20 damage.
potions.description_zh: 造成20点伤害。

potions.description: Gain 5 Strength. At the end of your turn, lose 5 Strength.
potions.description_en: Gain 5 Strength. At the end of your turn, lose 5 Strength.
potions.description_zh: 获得5点力量。在你的这个回合结束时，失去5点力量。

potions.description: Choose 1 of 3 random Skill cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.
potions.description_en: Choose 1 of 3 random Skill cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.
potions.description_zh: 从3张随机技能牌中选择1张加入你的手牌。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。

characters.name: The Ironclad
characters.description: Returning in Slay the Spire 2 as the master of martial prowess and demonic pacts. Enhanced Vulnerability synergies, deeper Self-Damage scaling, and advanced Exhaust interactions raise his tactical ceiling higher than ever.
characters.description_en: Returning in Slay the Spire 2 as the master of martial prowess and demonic pacts. Enhanced Vulnerability synergies, deeper Self-Damage scaling, and advanced Exhaust interactions raise his tactical ceiling higher than ever.
characters.description_zh:
铁甲军团最后的士兵。
并非出自自身的意愿，用刀剑与烈焰击溃敌人们。

characters.name: The Silent
characters.description: Returning in Slay the Spire 2 as a deadly acrobat specializing in small attacks and toxins. The new Sly keyword transforms discard-heavy decks, and evolved Shiv synergies make her more explosive than ever.
characters.description_en: Returning in Slay the Spire 2 as a deadly acrobat specializing in small attacks and toxins. The new Sly keyword transforms discard-heavy decks, and evolved Shiv synergies make her more explosive than ever.
characters.description_zh:
一位来自尖塔之外的女猎手。
随时准备刀刺与毒杀任何拦路者。

characters.name: The Regent
characters.description: A sophisticated and mysterious figure who manages Stars as a secondary resource. Focuses on resource management, card transformation, and the Forge mechanic to scale the Sovereign Blade.
characters.description_en: A sophisticated and mysterious figure who manages Stars as a secondary resource. Focuses on resource management, card transformation, and the Forge mechanic to scale the Sovereign Blade.
characters.description_zh:
群星王座的继承人。
拥有宇宙的力量，但总是让他的仆从们去做各种事情。

characters.name: Necrobinder
characters.description: A master of the macabre in Slay the Spire 2, wielding proxy combat through her companion Austy, the lethal Doom mechanic, and Soul token cycling for explosive velocity turns.
characters.description_en: A master of the macabre in Slay the Spire 2, wielding proxy combat through her companion Austy, the lethal Doom mechanic, and Soul token cycling for explosive velocity turns.
characters.description_zh:
一位出生在尖塔的巫妖，正在寻求复仇。
战斗中会召唤她可靠的左手奥斯提。

characters.name: The Defect
characters.description: The fan-favourite automaton returns in Slay the Spire 2 with reworked Orb mechanics — Lightning, Frost, Dark, and a brand-new Orb type. Channels elemental power to deal damage, gain Block, and unleash devastating combos.
characters.description_en: The fan-favourite automaton returns in Slay the Spire 2 with reworked Orb mechanics — Lightning, Frost, Dark, and a brand-new Orb type. Channels elemental power to deal damage, gain Block, and unleash devastating combos.
characters.description_zh:
一具不停改造自己来生存下去的自动机械。
在不得不战斗时，它会使用充能球科技来作战。

events.title: Abyssal Baths
events.description:
You discover a secluded chamber.
Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with salt and something unmistakably organic.
As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.
events.description_en:
You discover a secluded chamber.
Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with salt and something unmistakably organic.
As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.
events.description_zh:
你发现了一间僻静的密室。
氤氲的雾气从沸腾的池水中升腾而起，池水的色泽正以一种催眠般的节奏变幻。天花板上垂挂着覆满藤壶的异形生长物，滴落的黏稠液体在触及水面的瞬间，一边发出嘶嘶声，一边如活物般扭动挣扎。空气粘滞沉重，充斥着盐的味道和某种不言而喻的活物的气息。
当你靠近那口最大的水池时，液面泛起了涟漪。水流翻腾得愈发狂乱，仿佛正期待着你的到来。

options.title: Abstain
options.description: Heal 10 HP.
options.description_en: Heal 10 HP.
options.description_zh: 回复10点生命。

options.title: Immerse
options.description: Gain 2 Max HP. Take 3 damage.
options.description_en: Gain 2 Max HP. Take 3 damage.
options.description_zh: 获得2点最大生命值。受到3点伤害。

events.title: Amalgamator
events.description:
CLANG! CLANG!!!
You hear the echoes of metal upon metal on the otherside of a wall...
As you press your head against the wall to listen in—the wall opens up, revealing a hulking six-armed figure toiling away.
Its “face” is a swirling vortex of glowing sigils that shift about.
“One with an Ascending Spirit has found my workshop? Let's get COMBINING!”
events.description_en:
CLANG! CLANG!!!
You hear the echoes of metal upon metal on the otherside of a wall...
As you press your head against the wall to listen in—the wall opens up, revealing a hulking six-armed figure toiling away.
Its “face” is a swirling vortex of glowing sigils that shift about.
“One with an Ascending Spirit has found my workshop? Let's get COMBINING!”
events.description_zh:
铿！铿！！锵！！！
墙壁的另一侧传来了阵阵金属交击声的回响…
当你把头贴在墙上准备探听一番时——墙壁轰然开启，露出了一个正在埋头苦干的魁梧六臂身影。
它的“脸部”是一团由发光符文构成的流转旋涡，正在不断变幻交织。
“一个拥有进阶之魂的人竟然找到了我的工坊？那就让我们开始融合吧！”

options.description: Remove 2 Defends. Add Ultimate Defend to your Deck.
options.description_en: Remove 2 Defends. Add Ultimate Defend to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 移除2张防御。并将一张究极防御添加至你的牌组。

options.description: Remove 2 Strikes. Add Ultimate Strike to your Deck.
options.description_en: Remove 2 Strikes. Add Ultimate Strike to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 移除2张打击。并将一张究极打击添加至你的牌组。

events.title: Aroma of Chaos
events.description:
Upon trudging through a thick underbrush and making it into a clearing, you're hit with an unplaceable nostalgia.
A mix of floral scents, putrid decay, and something else entirely. The scent grows stronger with each step, and you feel as though the world around you is warping and twisting.
Overcome with a sense of [rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]shifting chaos[/rainbow], you begin to lose your sense of self.
events.description_en:
Upon trudging through a thick underbrush and making it into a clearing, you're hit with an unplaceable nostalgia.
A mix of floral scents, putrid decay, and something else entirely. The scent grows stronger with each step, and you feel as though the world around you is warping and twisting.
Overcome with a sense of [rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]shifting chaos[/rainbow], you begin to lose your sense of self.
events.description_zh:
费力地穿过一片厚密的灌木丛并来到空地后，一种莫名的怀旧感突然向你袭来。
那是花朵的芬芳、腐烂的恶臭以及某种无法言说的气息的混合体。每前进一步，这股气味都变得愈发浓烈。与此同时，你感受到周围的世界正开始扭曲，旋转。
一股[rainbow]变幻莫测的混沌[/rainbow]将你淹没，你开始慢慢地丧失了对自我的感知。

Overcome with a sense of shifting chaos, you begin to lose your sense of self.

options.description_zh: 升级你牌组中的一张牌。

events.title: Battleworn Dummy
events.description:
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!
“BZZZT! TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE 3 TURNS TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE LETHAL HUMILIATION.
Here are the options:”
After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.
What do you choose?
events.description_en:
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!
“BZZZT! TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE 3 TURNS TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE LETHAL HUMILIATION.
Here are the options:”
After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.
What do you choose?
events.description_zh:
当你靠近时，它突然开始轰鸣，滋滋作响，随后爆发出耀眼的光芒！
“滋滋！ 训练时间到！！！你有3个回合的时间来击败我！
选择一个档位，否则就准备好面对致命的羞辱吧。
以下是可选方案：”
在发布完这段恐怖的宣言后，假人开始认真地读出详细的指令。
要选哪一个呢？

Here are the options:”

What do you choose?

What do you choose?
events.description_plain_zh:
当你靠近时，它突然开始轰鸣，滋滋作响，随后爆发出耀眼的光芒！
“滋滋！ 训练时间到！！！你有3个回合的时间来击败我！
选择一个档位，否则就准备好面对致命的羞辱吧。
以下是可选方案：”
在发布完这段恐怖的宣言后，假人开始认真地读出详细的指令。
要选哪一个呢？

options.title: Setting 1
options.description: Fight a 75 HP dummy. Procure 1 random Potion.
options.description_en: Fight a 75 HP dummy. Procure 1 random Potion.
options.description_zh: 与一个75点生命值的假人战斗。随机获取1瓶药水。

options.title: Setting 2
options.description: Fight a 150 HP dummy. Upgrade 2 random cards.
options.description_en: Fight a 150 HP dummy. Upgrade 2 random cards.
options.description_zh: 与一个150点生命值的假人战斗。随机升级2张牌。

options.title: Setting 3
options.description: Fight a 300 HP dummy. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_en: Fight a 300 HP dummy. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_zh: 与一个300点生命值的假人战斗。获取一件随机遗物。

events.title: Brain Leech
events.description:
*thunk*
A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.
“SHARE KNOWLEDGE???”
You are unsure how to proceed...
events.description_en:
*thunk*
A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.
“SHARE KNOWLEDGE???”
You are unsure how to proceed...
events.description_zh:
咚！
你的头顶传来一阵刺痛，一个念头刺入了你的脑海。
“分享知识吗？？？”
你不知如何是好…
events.description_plain:

A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.
“SHARE KNOWLEDGE???”
You are unsure how to proceed...

options.title: Rip the Leech Off
options.description: Lose 5 HP. Gain a Colorless card reward.
options.description_en: Lose 5 HP. Gain a Colorless card reward.
options.description_zh: 失去5点生命值。获得一次无色卡牌奖励。

options.title: Share Knowledge
options.description: Choose 1 of 5 random cards to add to your Deck.
options.description_en: Choose 1 of 5 random cards to add to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 从5张随机牌中选择1张加入你的牌组。

events.title: Bugslayer
events.description:
As you're fending off a swarm of aggressive insects you suddenly notice a Mighty Rugged Warrior-Man fighting beside you this whole time!
The insects, sensing defeat, scatter. You turn to your fellow fighter.
“Would you like any tips on exterminating these pests?”
How polite. You nod and accept his offer.
events.description_en:
As you're fending off a swarm of aggressive insects you suddenly notice a Mighty Rugged Warrior-Man fighting beside you this whole time!
The insects, sensing defeat, scatter. You turn to your fellow fighter.
“Would you like any tips on exterminating these pests?”
How polite. You nod and accept his offer.
events.description_zh:
当你正奋力抵御一群穷凶极恶的虫群时，你突然注意到，一位威猛剽悍的战士竟然一直就在你身边并肩作战！
虫群们，察觉败局，四散而逃。你转向这位战友。
“你想要一些消灭这些害虫的建议吗？”
还挺有礼貌。你点了点头，接受了他的提议。

How polite. You nod and accept his offer.

options.title: Learn Extermination Technique
options.description: Add Exterminate to your Deck.
options.description_en: Add Exterminate to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 将一张杀灭添加至你的牌组。

options.title: Learn Squash Technique
options.description: Add Squash to your Deck.
options.description_en: Add Squash to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 将一张压扁添加至你的牌组

events.title: Byrdonis Nest
events.description:
You spot an enormous Shambling Beast chase off an injured Green Byrd.
In the alcove the byrd fled from, a single unguarded egg lies abandoned.
Your stomach gurgles...
events.description_en:
You spot an enormous Shambling Beast chase off an injured Green Byrd.
In the alcove the byrd fled from, a single unguarded egg lies abandoned.
Your stomach gurgles...
events.description_zh:
你看见一只巨大的蹒跚巨兽正在驱赶一只受伤的绿色异鸟。
在那只异鸟逃离的隐蔽角落里，一颗无人看守的蛋被遗弃在了那里。
你的肚子咕咕作响…
events.description_plain:
You spot an enormous Shambling Beast chase off an injured Green Byrd.
In the alcove the byrd fled from, a single unguarded egg lies abandoned.
Your stomach gurgles...

你的肚子咕咕作响…

options.title: Eat the Egg
options.description: Gain 7 Max HP.
options.description_en: Gain 7 Max HP.
options.description_zh: 获得7点最大生命值。

options.title: Take the Egg
options.description: Add Byrdonis Egg to your Deck.
options.description_en: Add Byrdonis Egg to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 将一张多尼斯异鸟蛋加入你的牌组。

events.title: Colorful Philosophers
events.description:
Before you is a rather epic sight.
You see 3 different colored statues towering over a dais, having a heated debate over the philosophical implications of color.
As you listen in, you get a sense that the most important question at hand is which color truly is THE BEST.
You chime in with your thoughts.
events.description_en:
Before you is a rather epic sight.
You see 3 different colored statues towering over a dais, having a heated debate over the philosophical implications of color.
As you listen in, you get a sense that the most important question at hand is which color truly is THE BEST.
You chime in with your thoughts.
events.description_zh:
在你面前的是一幕颇为宏伟的景象。
你看到三座不同颜色的石像耸立在高台之上，正就色彩的哲学内涵展开激烈的争论。
随着你的倾听，你感觉到眼下最核心的议题是，究竟哪种颜色才是最棒的。
你加入其中，表达了你的见解。

options.description: Obtain 3 Defect cards.

options.description_zh: 获得3张故障机器人的卡牌。

options.description_en: Obtain 3 Ironclad cards.
options.description_zh: 获得3张铁甲战士的卡牌。

options.title: Pink
options.description: Obtain 3 Necrobinder cards.
options.description_en: Obtain 3 Necrobinder cards.
options.description_zh: 获得3张亡灵契约师的卡牌。

options.title: Orange
options.description: Obtain 3 Regent cards.
options.description_en: Obtain 3 Regent cards.
options.description_zh: 获得3张储君的卡牌。

options.title: Green

options.description_en: Obtain 3 Silent cards.
options.description_zh: 获得3张静默猎手的卡牌。

events.title: Colossal Flower
events.description:
There is a colossal flower growing atop a mountain of bones.
As its [rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]color-shifting petals[/rainbow] pulsate, you sense there is a Powerful Cluster of Pollen in the center but the undulating petals are razor sharp and unpredictable.
You could grab some of the golden nectar, but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...
events.description_en:
There is a colossal flower growing atop a mountain of bones.
As its [rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]color-shifting petals[/rainbow] pulsate, you sense there is a Powerful Cluster of Pollen in the center but the undulating petals are razor sharp and unpredictable.
You could grab some of the golden nectar, but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...
events.description_zh:
一朵巨型花卉正生长在一座骸骨堆积而成的山上。
随着它那[rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]变换色彩的花瓣[/rainbow]不断搏动，你感觉到中心处一定有一团强力花粉，但那起伏的花瓣如刀锋般锋利且捉摸不定。
你本可以只采集一些金色花蜜，但中心处的那个奖赏实在是太诱人了…

options.description: Gain 35 Gold.
options.description_en: Gain 35 Gold.
options.description_zh: 获得35金币。

options.title: Reach Deeper
options.description: Enter deeper. Lose 5 HP.
options.description_en: Enter deeper. Lose 5 HP.
options.description_zh: 深入。失去5点生命值

events.title: Crystal Sphere
events.description:
“I predicted you'd enter...!”
A raspy voice calls out as you enter a mystic hut.
“Your destiny has brought you here. We must uncover your future and fortunes so you can SAVE US ALL!!”
“Okay, here are the options for the Crystal Sphere reading. Be sure to sign this waiver as well,” she says while bringing out pen and parchment.
events.description_en:
“I predicted you'd enter...!”
A raspy voice calls out as you enter a mystic hut.
“Your destiny has brought you here. We must uncover your future and fortunes so you can SAVE US ALL!!”
“Okay, here are the options for the Crystal Sphere reading. Be sure to sign this waiver as well,” she says while bringing out pen and parchment.
events.description_zh:
“我预见到了你的到来…！”
当你走进一间神秘小屋时，一个沙哑的声音传了过来。
“你的命运指引你来到此处。我们必须揭开你的未来与运势，这样你才能拯救我们所有人！！”
“好啦，这是进行水晶球占卜的几个选项。另外，记得把这份免责协议也签了，”她一边说着，一边拿出了笔和羊皮纸。

“Your destiny has brought you here. We must uncover your future and fortunes so you can SAVE US ALL!!”

options.title: Payment Plan
options.description: Gain a Debt. Divine 6 times.
options.description_en: Gain a Debt. Divine 6 times.
options.description_zh: 获得一张债务。占卜6次。

options.title: Uncover Future
options.description: Pay 50 Gold. Divine 3 times.
options.description_en: Pay 50 Gold. Divine 3 times.
options.description_zh: 支付50金币。占卜3次。

events.title: Dense Vegetation
events.description:
Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of ferns, shrubs, and vines. Especially vines. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:
“You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”
What do you do?
events.description_en:
Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of ferns, shrubs, and vines. Especially vines. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:
“You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”
What do you do?
events.description_zh:
你在错路上走了一段时间之后，你发现自己置身于一片由蕨类、灌木和藤蔓构成的茂密丛林中。尤其是藤蔓。精疲力竭的感觉油然而生，一个可怕的念头随之浮现在脑海里：
“你迷路了，毫无防备，而死亡的阴影正悄然逼近。”
你要怎么办呢？

“You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”
What do you do?

options.title: Rest
options.description: Heal varies HP. Fight some enemies.
options.description_en: Heal varies HP. Fight some enemies.
options.description_zh: 回复视情况而定点生命。进入战斗。

options.title: Trudge On
options.description: Gain {Gold} Gold. Lose 11 HP.
options.description_en: Gain {Gold} Gold. Lose 11 HP.
options.description_zh: 获得{Gold} 金币。失去11点生命。

events.title: Doll Room
events.description:
You enter a hidden room...
It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from joy to sorrow, their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own.
A chorus of whispers grows louder and louder until the dolls are shouting over each other and calling for you...
You must choose one and leave immediately.
events.description_en:
You enter a hidden room...
It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from joy to sorrow, their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own.
A chorus of whispers grows louder and louder until the dolls are shouting over each other and calling for you...
You must choose one and leave immediately.
events.description_zh:
你走进了一间隐藏的密室……
这里堆满了琳琅满目的玩偶。每一只都独一无二，它们的表情亦从喜悦到悲哀各不相同，其服饰跨越了数个世纪，甚至来自你认知之外的领域。
一阵低语的合唱变得越来越响，直到那些玩偶互相争吵着大叫起来，放声呼唤着你……
你必须选择一个，并立刻离开这个地方。

A chorus of whispers grows louder and louder until the dolls are shouting over each other and calling for you...
You must choose one and leave immediately.

options.title: Examine Each and Make the Best Choice
options.title_en: Examine Each and Make the Best Choice
options.title_zh: 仔细检查然后挑选最好的那个
options.description: Lose 15 HP. Choose 1 of 3 Doll Relics.
options.description_en: Lose 15 HP. Choose 1 of 3 Doll Relics.
options.description_zh: 失去15点生命。从3尊玩偶遗物中选择1尊带走。

options.title: Pick at Random
options.description: Obtain a random Doll Relic.
options.description_en: Obtain a random Doll Relic.
options.description_zh: 获取一尊玩偶遗物。

options.title: Take Some Time
options.description: Lose 5 HP. Choose 1 of 2 Doll Relics.
options.description_en: Lose 5 HP. Choose 1 of 2 Doll Relics.
options.description_zh: 失去5点生命。从2尊玩偶遗物中选择1尊带走。

events.title: Doors of Light and Dark
events.description:
A doorway existed where none existed moments before...
You enter to find two shimmering doorways and a well-dressed doorman.
“Finally, a visitor! Please please! Choose a door, any door!”
Are we still in the Spire? How is this place so clean?
events.description_en:
A doorway existed where none existed moments before...
You enter to find two shimmering doorways and a well-dressed doorman.
“Finally, a visitor! Please please! Choose a door, any door!”
Are we still in the Spire? How is this place so clean?
events.description_zh:
一道门扉突然凭空出现了…
你步入其中，见到了两道散发着微光的门，以及一位衣着得体的看门人。
“终于有访客了！请，请！选一扇门，任何一扇都可以！”
我们还在尖塔里吗？这地方为何竟如此洁净？

You enter to find two shimmering doorways and a well-dressed doorman.
“Finally, a visitor! Please please! Choose a door, any door!”
Are we still in the Spire? How is this place so clean?

options.title: Dark Door
options.description: Remove 1 card from your Deck.
options.description_en: Remove 1 card from your Deck.
options.description_zh: 从你的牌组中选择1张牌移除。

options.title: Light Door
options.description: Upgrade 2 random cards.
options.description_en: Upgrade 2 random cards.
options.description_zh: 随机升级2张牌。

events.title: Drowning Beacon
events.description:
Crossing a dreamscape of rocks and still waters, you emerge to face a sinking lighthouse emitting anti-light.
You can bottle up the eerily-glowing water that has pooled here or climb up the dilapidated structure to retrieve the lens.
events.description_en:
Crossing a dreamscape of rocks and still waters, you emerge to face a sinking lighthouse emitting anti-light.
You can bottle up the eerily-glowing water that has pooled here or climb up the dilapidated structure to retrieve the lens.
events.description_zh:
穿过一片由岩石与静水构成的梦幻之境，你来到了一座散发着逆流光的沉没灯塔前。
你可以把积聚在此的诡异发光水装进瓶子里，或者爬上这座破败的建筑，取下其中的透镜。
events.description_plain:
Crossing a dreamscape of rocks and still waters, you emerge to face a sinking lighthouse emitting anti-light.
You can bottle up the eerily-glowing water that has pooled here or climb up the dilapidated structure to retrieve the lens.
events.description_plain_en:
Crossing a dreamscape of rocks and still waters, you emerge to face a sinking lighthouse emitting anti-light.
You can bottle up the eerily-glowing water that has pooled here or climb up the dilapidated structure to retrieve the lens.
events.description_plain_zh:
穿过一片由岩石与静水构成的梦幻之境，你来到了一座散发着逆流光的沉没灯塔前。
你可以把积聚在此的诡异发光水装进瓶子里，或者爬上这座破败的建筑，取下其中的透镜。

options.title: Bottle
options.description: Procure Glowwater Potion.
options.description_en: Procure Glowwater Potion.
options.description_zh: 获得一瓶发光水。

options.title: Climb
options.description: Obtain Fresnel Lens. Lose 13 Max HP.
options.description_en: Obtain Fresnel Lens. Lose 13 Max HP.
options.description_zh: 获得菲涅耳透镜。失去13点最大生命。

events.title: Endless Conveyor
events.description:
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
“ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!”
Inside, a willowy multi-armed chef is deftly preparing bites of food and placing them onto a winding chitinous belt.
One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
35 Gold each
events.description_en:
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
“ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!”
Inside, a willowy multi-armed chef is deftly preparing bites of food and placing them onto a winding chitinous belt.
One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
35 Gold each
events.description_zh:
你走进一间挂着歪斜招牌的小木屋，招牌亮得发晃，上面写着：
“无尽盛宴—按饿付费！”
屋里，一位身形修长的多臂大厨正熟练地准备着一份份小食，并将它们摆在一条蜿蜒的几丁质传送带上。
大厨其中的一只手臂指向一块牌子：
每份35金币
events.description_plain:

Inside, a willowy multi-armed chef is deftly preparing bites of food and placing them onto a winding chitinous belt.
One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
35 Gold each

options.title: Observe the Chef
options.description: Upgrade a random card in your Deck.
options.description_en: Upgrade a random card in your Deck.
options.description_zh: 从牌组中随机升级一张牌。

events.title: Field of Man-Sized Holes
events.description:
The sudden sight of a massive field, gouged with large outlines of bodies, stops you in your tracks.
One of these outlines matches your own.
It's perfect...
events.description_en:
The sudden sight of a massive field, gouged with large outlines of bodies, stops you in your tracks.
One of these outlines matches your own.
It's perfect...
events.description_zh:
眼前突然出现一大片土地，上面凿刻着密密麻麻的人形轮廓，让你不由得停下了脚步。
其中有一个洞的轮廓，竟然和你的体型一模一样。
完美契合…
events.description_plain:
The sudden sight of a massive field, gouged with large outlines of bodies, stops you in your tracks.
One of these outlines matches your own.
It's perfect...
events.description_plain_en:

其中有一个洞的轮廓，竟然和你的体型一模一样。
完美契合…

options.title: Enter Your Hole
options.description: Enchant a card with Perfect Fit.
options.description_en: Enchant a card with Perfect Fit.
options.description_zh: 为一张牌附魔：完美契合。

options.title: Resist
options.description: Remove 2 cards from your Deck. Add Normality to your Deck.
options.description_en: Remove 2 cards from your Deck. Add Normality to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 从你的牌组中移除2张牌。将一张凡庸添加到你的牌组中。

events.title: Grave of the Forgotten
events.description:
There is a single grave with a roiling blue flame...
A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it begging to journey with you.
But perhaps it's better for it to face the truth?
events.description_en:
There is a single grave with a roiling blue flame...
A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it begging to journey with you.
But perhaps it's better for it to face the truth?
events.description_zh:
一座孤冢上翻腾着汹涌的蓝焰…
一名高傲的战士战死于此，灵魂却躁动不安。但它渴望继续战斗，你甚至能感觉到它在哀求你带着它一起踏上征途。
但也许，让它直面真相才是更好的选择？
events.description_plain:
There is a single grave with a roiling blue flame...
A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it begging to journey with you.
But perhaps it's better for it to face the truth?

但也许，让它直面真相才是更好的选择？

options.title: Accept the Forgotten Soul
options.description: Obtain Forgotten Soul.
options.description_en: Obtain Forgotten Soul.
options.description_zh: 获得遗忘之魂。

options.title: Confront with Truth
options.description: Add Decay to your Deck. Enchant a card that Exhausts with Soul's Power.
options.description_en: Add Decay to your Deck. Enchant a card that Exhausts with Soul's Power.
options.description_zh: 将一张腐朽到你的牌组。 为一张带有消耗的牌附魔：灵魂之力。

events.title: Hungry for Mushrooms
events.description:
How long has it been since you ate?
...wait, what's that fantastic smell?
Following the scent, you reach a cozy campground with all manner of tasty mushrooms being cooked! You don't consider the safety of eating these mushrooms because you are so hungry.
(So hungry that you don't notice the dead adventurer)
events.description_en:
How long has it been since you ate?
...wait, what's that fantastic smell?
Following the scent, you reach a cozy campground with all manner of tasty mushrooms being cooked! You don't consider the safety of eating these mushrooms because you are so hungry.
(So hungry that you don't notice the dead adventurer)
events.description_zh:
上一次吃饭是什么时候来着？
…等等，这股奇妙的香味是怎么回事？
循着气味，你来到了一处温馨的营地，各种美味的蘑菇正在火上烤着！由于实在是太饿了，你甚至完全没想过这些玩意儿安不安全。
（你饿得甚至连旁边有个死掉的冒险者这事都没注意到）
events.description_plain:
How long has it been since you ate?
...wait, what's that fantastic smell?
Following the scent, you reach a cozy campground with all manner of tasty mushrooms being cooked! You don't consider the safety of eating these mushrooms because you are so hungry.
(So hungry that you don't notice the dead adventurer)

events.title: Infested Automaton
events.description:
There's a chamber filled with dead robots.
A lone automaton still has a faintly glowing core but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.
events.description_en:
There's a chamber filled with dead robots.
A lone automaton still has a faintly glowing core but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.
events.description_zh:
这间密室里堆满了报废的机器人。
其中一台孤零零的自动机械，其核心仍在幽幽发光，但它已被一种诡异的有机增生组织吞没，毫无响应。
events.description_plain:
There's a chamber filled with dead robots.
A lone automaton still has a faintly glowing core but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.

options.title: Study
options.description: Obtain a random Power.
options.description_en: Obtain a random Power.
options.description_zh: 随机获得一张能力牌。

options.title: Touch the Core
options.description: Obtain a random 0 cost card.
options.description_en: Obtain a random 0 cost card.
options.description_zh: 随机获得一张耗能为0的牌。

events.title: Jungle Maze Adventure
events.description:
In a clearing, you run into a Ragtag Group of Adventurers looking down and gesturing at a gigantic maze.
They offer to join forces with you in an Epic Quest to loot the riches of this maze. As an experienced adventurer yourself, it's clear this maze is filled with deadly traps and guardians.
It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.
events.description_en:
In a clearing, you run into a Ragtag Group of Adventurers looking down and gesturing at a gigantic maze.
They offer to join forces with you in an Epic Quest to loot the riches of this maze. As an experienced adventurer yourself, it's clear this maze is filled with deadly traps and guardians.
It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.
events.description_zh:
在一片林间空地上，你撞见了一群寒碜的冒险者小队，他们正俯瞰着一座巨型迷宫并指手画脚。
他们邀请你入伙，共同开启一场搜刮迷宫财富的史诗级任务。身为老手，你心知肚明这迷宫里塞满了致命陷阱和守卫。
搭伙干活确实容易些，但那样你就得跟人平分战利品了。

It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.

options.title: Join Forces
options.description: Gain 50 Gold.
options.description_en: Gain 50 Gold.
options.description_zh: 获得50金币。

options.title: Solo Quest
options.description: Gain 150 Gold. Lose 18 HP.
options.description_en: Gain 150 Gold. Lose 18 HP.
options.description_zh: 获得150金币。失去18点生命。

events.title: The Lost Wisp
events.description:
In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of deceased insects, surrounding what looks to be a small glowing mote.
It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!
You move closer to investigate.
events.description_en:
In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of deceased insects, surrounding what looks to be a small glowing mote.
It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!
You move closer to investigate.
events.description_zh:
远处有一幕古怪的景象。成堆的昆虫残骸层层堆叠，围绕着一个像是微小的光团的东西。
它似乎对各种虫子都有着不俗的吸引力，但你却目睹了它迸发出火焰！
你走近前去一探究竟。
events.description_plain:
In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of deceased insects, surrounding what looks to be a small glowing mote.
It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!
You move closer to investigate.

options.title: Capture the Wisp
options.description: Add Decay to your Deck. Obtain the Lost Wisp.
options.description_en: Add Decay to your Deck. Obtain the Lost Wisp.
options.description_zh: 将一张腐朽添加到你的牌组。获得迷失鬼火。

options.title: Search the Nearby Area
options.description: Gain 60 Gold.
options.description_en: Gain 60 Gold.
options.description_zh: 获得60金币。

events.title: Luminous Choir
events.description:
You stumble upon a clearing bathed in an unnatural blue glow. Towering mushrooms pulse with bioluminescence, their caps swollen and glistening. As you approach, the fungi begin to emit haunting, melodic tones that reverberate throughout your chest.
You notice something gleaming, embedded within the largest mushroom's flesh, pulsing in rhythm with the fungal song.
events.description_en:
You stumble upon a clearing bathed in an unnatural blue glow. Towering mushrooms pulse with bioluminescence, their caps swollen and glistening. As you approach, the fungi begin to emit haunting, melodic tones that reverberate throughout your chest.
You notice something gleaming, embedded within the largest mushroom's flesh, pulsing in rhythm with the fungal song.
events.description_zh:
你撞入了一片沐浴在诡异蓝光下的林间空地。高耸的蘑菇随着生物荧光起伏脉动，菌盖肿胀而泛着光泽。当你靠近时，真菌们竟开始发出凄美而婉转的旋律，这旋律在你的胸腔内激荡。
你注意到，在那个体型最大的蘑菇肉质中嵌入了某种闪光的东西，正随着真菌之歌有节奏地跃动。
events.description_plain:

You notice something gleaming, embedded within the largest mushroom's flesh, pulsing in rhythm with the fungal song.

options.title: Offer Tribute
options.description: Pay ~125 Gold. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_en: Pay ~125 Gold. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_zh: 支付~125金币。获取一件随机遗物。

options.title: Reach into the Flesh
options.description: Remove 2 cards from your Deck. Add Spore Mind to your Deck.
options.description_en: Remove 2 cards from your Deck. Add Spore Mind to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 从你的牌组移除2张牌。将一张孢子心灵添加到你的牌组。

events.title: Morphic Grove
events.description:
You enter a grove of crystalline trees, and they begin to quiver excitedly!
A chorus of hellos and welcomes bombard you as a group of Morphics burst forth from trees.
One of the Morphics is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.
Approach the group or the loner?
events.description_en:
You enter a grove of crystalline trees, and they begin to quiver excitedly!
A chorus of hellos and welcomes bombard you as a group of Morphics burst forth from trees.
One of the Morphics is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.
Approach the group or the loner?
events.description_zh:
你进入了一片结晶树的林谷，树木开始激动地颤抖起来！
一阵阵杂乱的问候与欢迎声在你耳边不断响起，原来是一群变形灵从树上绽放了出来。
有一只变形灵在角落里坐立不安的样子，显然不像其他同类那样善于社交。
你是去找一群变形灵，还是去找落单的那个？
events.description_plain:

One of the Morphics is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.
Approach the group or the loner?

options.title: Group
options.description: {IsMultiplayer:Everyone loses|Lose} ALL of {IsMultiplayer:their|your} Gold. Transform 2 cards.
options.description_en: {IsMultiplayer:Everyone loses|Lose} ALL of {IsMultiplayer:their|your} Gold. Transform 2 cards.
options.description_zh: {IsMultiplayer:所有人|}失去所有金币。变化2张牌。

options.title: Loner
options.description: Gain 5 Max HP.
options.description_en: Gain 5 Max HP.
options.description_zh: 获得5点最大生命。

events.title: Potion Courier
events.description:
There is a sour smell in the air and shortly after, you find a Potion Courier collapsed on the ground.
Unmoving. Lifeless. Dead!?
While their belongings have been ransacked, there is a batch of Foul Smelling Potions with a note: "Recipient: Merchant".
events.description_en:
There is a sour smell in the air and shortly after, you find a Potion Courier collapsed on the ground.
Unmoving. Lifeless. Dead!?
While their belongings have been ransacked, there is a batch of Foul Smelling Potions with a note: "Recipient: Merchant".
events.description_zh:
空气中传来一阵浓浓的酸味，不一会儿你在附近找到了一个倒在地上的药水快递员。
一动不动，已经没了气。死了！？
快递员带着的物品已经被洗劫得差不多了，只有一批很难闻的药水好好地放在那里，上面有一张字条：“收件人：商人”。
events.description_plain:

Unmoving. Lifeless. Dead!?

options.title: Grab Potions
options.description: Procure 3 Foul Potions.
options.description_en: Procure 3 Foul Potions.
options.description_zh: 获得3瓶污浊药水。

options.title: Ransack
options.description: Procure 1 random Uncommon Potion.
options.description_en: Procure 1 random Uncommon Potion.
options.description_zh: 获得1瓶随机罕见药水。

events.title: Punch Off
events.description:
Two Punch Constructs are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...
Should you try to nab it?
events.description_en:
Two Punch Constructs are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...
Should you try to nab it?
events.description_zh:
两个拳击构装体正在挥拳互殴，而你看到在它们两个之间有一些财宝……
要不要把财宝顺走？
events.description_plain:
Two Punch Constructs are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...
Should you try to nab it?
events.description_plain_en:
Two Punch Constructs are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...
Should you try to nab it?
events.description_plain_zh:
两个拳击构装体正在挥拳互殴，而你看到在它们两个之间有一些财宝……
要不要把财宝顺走？

options.title: I Can Take Them
options.description: Fight them for Greater Rewards.
options.description_en: Fight them for Greater Rewards.
options.description_zh: 和它们战斗以得到更好的奖励。

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add Injury to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_en: Add Injury to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_zh: 将一张受伤加入到你的牌组。获得一件随机遗物。

events.title: Ranwid the Elder
events.description:
You are approached by the oldest person you have ever seen.
“We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!”
You do not know this man.
events.description_en:
You are approached by the oldest person you have ever seen.
“We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!”
You do not know this man.

events.title: Relic Trader
events.description:
You turn a corner and suddenly, a shadowy figure is just standing there. He pivots to face you.
“Welcome! What're ya trading?”
The figure inquires as he flares open his cloak to reveal a slew of suspicious wares.
events.description_en:
You turn a corner and suddenly, a shadowy figure is just standing there. He pivots to face you.
“Welcome! What're ya trading?”
The figure inquires as he flares open his cloak to reveal a slew of suspicious wares.
events.description_zh:
你走过一个拐角，一个黑影突然矗立在前方。他转过身来，正对着你。
“欢迎！你想换点什么吶？”
他开口询问，同时猛地掀开斗篷，露出一大堆可疑货物。

“Welcome! What're ya trading?”

events.title: Room Full of Cheese
events.description:
This room is full of cheese!!!
You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more cheese. The candles in this room appear to be made of cheese. The furniture is also cheese.
Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut.
It is made of cheese.
events.description_en:
This room is full of cheese!!!
You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more cheese. The candles in this room appear to be made of cheese. The furniture is also cheese.
Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut.
It is made of cheese.
events.description_zh:
这房间里全是芝士！！！
你环顾四周，想看看有没有陷阱，结果发现头顶上是…更多的芝士。屋里的蜡烛似乎也是用芝士做的。家具同样是芝士。
突然，你身后的门砰地一声关上了。
也是芝士做的。

options.title: Gorge
options.description: Choose 2 of 8 random Common cards to add to your Deck.
options.description_en: Choose 2 of 8 random Common cards to add to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 从8张随机普通牌中选择2张加入到你的牌组。

options.title: Search
options.description: Lose 14 HP. Obtain the Chosen Cheese.
options.description_en: Lose 14 HP. Obtain the Chosen Cheese.
options.description_zh: 失去14点生命，获得天选芝士。

events.title: The Round Tea Party
events.description:
You find an invitation for a “Sir Galalot” to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead.
Upon entering an unassuming rotunda, you find yourself in the midst of commanders, generals, warlords, and mercenaries having... tea?
The gigantic knight donning a golden crown speaks.
“Thou art late for Tea?!”
events.description_en:
You find an invitation for a “Sir Galalot” to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead.
Upon entering an unassuming rotunda, you find yourself in the midst of commanders, generals, warlords, and mercenaries having... tea?
The gigantic knight donning a golden crown speaks.
“Thou art late for Tea?!”
events.description_zh:
你找到了一份送给“加拉洛特爵士”的请柬，邀请他参加一次茶会，于是你决定代他前去。
走进其貌不扬的圆形大厅时，你发现这里有一大群指挥官、将军、军阀和商人们，正在……喝着茶？
一个头戴金冠的巨人骑士开口说道：
“汝来茶会竟敢迟到？！”

“Thou art late for Tea?!”

options.title: Enjoy Your Tea
options.description: Obtain Royal Poison. Heal to full HP.
options.description_en: Obtain Royal Poison. Heal to full HP.
options.description_zh: 获得王室猛毒。回复全部生命。

options.title: Pick a Fight
options.description: Lose 11 HP. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_en: Lose 11 HP. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_zh: 失去11点生命。获得一件随机遗物。

events.title: Sapphire Seed
events.description:
You narrowly avoid stepping on a bright, sharp... seed? Its unmistakable color gives away that it's a Sapphire Seed! Weren't these incredible seeds supposed to be extinct!?
Legends say that consuming one can greatly amplify your endurance, but what if you plant and nourish it instead?
events.description_en:
You narrowly avoid stepping on a bright, sharp... seed? Its unmistakable color gives away that it's a Sapphire Seed! Weren't these incredible seeds supposed to be extinct!?
Legends say that consuming one can greatly amplify your endurance, but what if you plant and nourish it instead?
events.description_zh:
你走路时差点踩上了一块发光的尖锐……种子？它的颜色非常明确地表明了这是一枚蓝宝石种子！这些稀有种子不是应该已经灭绝了吗！？
传说里，只要吃下一粒这个种子，就能大幅强化你的体能，但如果你把它种下然后好好养育它，又会怎么样呢？
events.description_plain:

options.title: Consume
options.description: Heal 9 HP. Upgrade a card in your Deck.
options.description_en: Heal 9 HP. Upgrade a card in your Deck.
options.description_zh: 回复9生命。升级你牌组中的一张牌。

options.title: Plant and Nourish
options.description: Enchant a card with Sown.
options.description_en: Enchant a card with Sown.
options.description_zh: 给一张牌附魔：播种。

events.title: Self-Help Book
events.description:
On the floor lies a tome,
“Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire”
The book is encrusted with blood so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.
Will you read it?
events.description_en:
On the floor lies a tome,
“Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire”
The book is encrusted with blood so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.
Will you read it?
events.description_zh:
地上有一本书：
《征服高塔的3种最佳方法》
这本书上血迹斑斑，所以你觉得它非常可疑。
你要读它吗？

On the floor lies a tome,
“Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire”
The book is encrusted with blood so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.

options.description: You don't have any cards that can be Enchanted.
options.description_en: You don't have any cards that can be Enchanted.
options.description_zh: 你没有任何可以附魔的牌。

options.title: Read the Entire Book
options.description: Choose a Power to Enchant with Swift 2.
options.description_en: Choose a Power to Enchant with Swift 2.
options.description_zh: 选择一张能力牌附魔：迅速2。

options.description_en: Choose an Attack to Enchant with Sharp 2.
options.description_zh: 选择一张攻击牌附魔：锋利2。

events.title: Slippery Bridge
events.description: While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden torrent of rain. Massive gusts of wind buffet you, threatening to end your journey.
events.description_en: While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden torrent of rain. Massive gusts of wind buffet you, threatening to end your journey.
events.description_zh: 当你穿过一座摇摇欲坠的木桥时，忽然间暴雨倾盆。阵阵狂风不断向你袭来，似乎要将你的旅程终结于此。
events.description_plain: While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden torrent of rain. Massive gusts of wind buffet you, threatening to end your journey.
events.description_plain_en: While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden torrent of rain. Massive gusts of wind buffet you, threatening to end your journey.

options.title: Hold On
options.description: Lose 3 HP. The card in the above option is randomized.
options.description_en: Lose 3 HP. The card in the above option is randomized.
options.description_zh: 失去3点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。

options.title: Overcome
options.description: a random card is removed from your Deck.
options.description_en: a random card is removed from your Deck.
options.description_zh: 一张随机卡牌将从你的牌组中被移除。

events.title: Spiraling Whirlpool
events.description:
You happen upon a Massive Spiraling Whirlpool. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.
Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......
What do you do?
events.description_en:
You happen upon a Massive Spiraling Whirlpool. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.
Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......
What do you do?
events.description_zh:
你偶遇了一个巨大的螺旋漩涡。水流以精准而优雅的韵律回旋着，四周的墙壁也布满了螺旋纹路。
转啊，转啊…转…
…转个不停…何等奇景…
你要做什么呢？？
events.description_plain:
You happen upon a Massive Spiraling Whirlpool. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.
Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......
What do you do?

options.title: Drink
options.description: Heal varies HP.
options.description_en: Heal varies HP.
options.description_zh: 回复视情况而定点生命。

options.title: Observe
options.description: Enchant a Strike or Defend with Spiral.
options.description_en: Enchant a Strike or Defend with Spiral.
options.description_zh: 为一张“打击”或“防御”附魔：涡旋。

options.title: Reach In
options.description: Obtain a random Relic. Add Writhe to your Deck.
options.description_en: Obtain a random Relic. Add Writhe to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 获得一件随机遗物。 Add Writhe到你的牌组。

events.title: Spirit Grafter
events.description:
Above, a cocoon is shaking and wriggling, about to burst forth!
...it stops wriggling. The cocoon ignites! What is going on?
In a flash of light and flame, a Spirit Grafter rushes into you, threatening to merge with your being to become complete.
events.description_en:
Above, a cocoon is shaking and wriggling, about to burst forth!
...it stops wriggling. The cocoon ignites! What is going on?
In a flash of light and flame, a Spirit Grafter rushes into you, threatening to merge with your being to become complete.
events.description_zh:
在你上方，一个茧正在颤动扭曲，似乎就要破茧而出了！
……它停止了扭动。茧燃烧了起来！发生什么事了？
一道光芒与烈焰闪过，一个灵魂嫁接者向你冲来，试图要与你融为一体，以求完整。

options.description: Heal 25 HP. Add Metamorphosis to your Deck.
options.description_en: Heal 25 HP. Add Metamorphosis to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 回复25点生命。将一张羽化添加到你的牌组。

options.title: Rejection
options.description: Lose 9 HP. Upgrade a card.
options.description_en: Lose 9 HP. Upgrade a card.
options.description_zh: 失去9点生命。升级一张牌。

events.title: Stone of All Time
events.description:
A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.
A plaque reads:
Stone of All Time.
Its presence, shape, and adornments indicate that this courtyard was built around this Stone and that it has never moved from this spot.
events.description_en:
A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.
A plaque reads:
Stone of All Time.
Its presence, shape, and adornments indicate that this courtyard was built around this Stone and that it has never moved from this spot.
events.description_zh:
在一个废弃庭院的当中，有一块巨大的石头。
石头边的一块牌子上写着：
永恒之石。
从它的样子、形状和装饰来看，整个庭院都是围绕着这块石头建造出来的，它从来没有离开过那个地点哪怕一次。

A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.

options.description: Lose a random Potion. Gain 10 Max HP.
options.description_en: Lose a random Potion. Gain 10 Max HP.
options.description_zh: 失去一瓶随机药水。获得10最大生命。

options.title: Push
options.description: Lose 6 HP. Enchant an Attack with Vigorous 8.
options.description_en: Lose 6 HP. Enchant an Attack with Vigorous 8.
options.description_zh: 失去6点生命。附魔一张攻击牌：活力8。

events.title: The Sunken Statue
events.description:
You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a stone sword.
Something is also glittering at the bottom of the pond.
Votive offerings perhaps?
You could really use some money...
events.description_en:
You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a stone sword.
Something is also glittering at the bottom of the pond.
Votive offerings perhaps?
You could really use some money...
events.description_zh:
你看见一尊古老的雕像，一半沉没在池塘的水中。雕像的手放在一把石剑之上。
同时你还看见，池塘的水底似乎有一些东西在闪烁着光芒。
或许是人们祈愿投下的金币？
钱可是个好东西……
events.description_plain:

Votive offerings perhaps?
You could really use some money...

events.description_plain_zh:
你看见一尊古老的雕像，一半沉没在池塘的水中。雕像的手放在一把石剑之上。
同时你还看见，池塘的水底似乎有一些东西在闪烁着光芒。
或许是人们祈愿投下的金币？
钱可是个好东西……

options.title: Dive into the Water
options.description: Gain ~111 Gold. Lose 7 HP.
options.description_en: Gain ~111 Gold. Lose 7 HP.
options.description_zh: 获得~111金币。失去7点生命.

options.title: Grab the Sword
options.description: Obtain the Sword of Stone.
options.description_en: Obtain the Sword of Stone.
options.description_zh: 获得石之剑。

events.title: Sunken Treasury
events.description:
A path leads you into a partially submerged vault.
There are 2 chests but only 1 brittle key.
The First Chest: Shaking it, you get jingly-jangly noises. Bit of gold.
The Second Chest: Enormous, ornate, and clearly cursed. Lots of gold!
events.description_en:
A path leads you into a partially submerged vault.
There are 2 chests but only 1 brittle key.
The First Chest: Shaking it, you get jingly-jangly noises. Bit of gold.
The Second Chest: Enormous, ornate, and clearly cursed. Lots of gold!
events.description_zh:
一条小路让你找到了一个部分淹水的金库。
你看到里面有2个箱子，但却只有1把脆弱的钥匙。
第一个箱子：你摇晃了一下，能听到叮铃哐啷的轻响，应该是少量金币。
第二个箱子：巨大、精致、而且显然被诅咒了。里面有很多金币！
events.description_plain:

The Second Chest: Enormous, ornate, and clearly cursed. Lots of gold!

options.title: First Chest
options.description: Gain ~60 Gold.
options.description_en: Gain ~60 Gold.
options.description_zh: 获得~60金币。

options.title: Second Chest
options.description: Gain ~333 Gold. Receive Greed.
options.description_en: Gain ~333 Gold. Receive Greed.
options.description_zh: 获得~333金币。得到贪婪。

events.title: Symbiote
events.description:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.
Approach...
events.description_en:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.
Approach...
events.description_zh:
在你的旅程中，你遇到了一个黑色无定形的肉块状生物，你能感觉到它非常古老、并且非常邪恶。
过来吧…
events.description_plain:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.
Approach...
events.description_plain_en:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.
Approach...

过来吧…

options.title: Approach
options.description: Enchant an Attack with Corrupted.
options.description_en: Enchant an Attack with Corrupted.
options.description_zh: 将一张攻击牌附魔：腐化。

options.title: Kill with Fire
options.description: Choose a card to Transform.
options.description_en: Choose a card to Transform.
options.description_zh: 选择一张牌变化。

events.title: Tablet of Truth
events.description:
You defeat a pair of Guardian Kin and make your way into a protected vault.
Inside is a tablet with familiar inscriptions. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.
The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its healing energies instead.
events.description_en:
You defeat a pair of Guardian Kin and make your way into a protected vault.
Inside is a tablet with familiar inscriptions. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.
The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its healing energies instead.
events.description_zh:
你打败了两只同族守护者，进入了它们守护的藏宝库。
里面有一块刻着熟悉铭文的石板。你的直觉告诉你，上面的语言可以轻易解读……可是一旦开始解读，你就必须全神贯注。
石板上散发出一种令人安心的能量，你也可以就这样砸碎它，来获取其中的治愈能量。

Inside is a tablet with familiar inscriptions. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.
The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its healing energies instead.

options.title: Decipher
options.description: Lose 3 Max HP. Upgrade a random card.
options.description_en: Lose 3 Max HP. Upgrade a random card.
options.description_zh: 失去3点最大生命。随机升级一张牌。

options.title: Smash
options.description: Heal 20 HP.
options.description_en: Heal 20 HP.
options.description_zh: 回复20点生命。

events.title: Tea Master
events.description:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.
The man inside gestures to a selection of teas, each neatly labeled with a premium price.
events.description_en:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.
The man inside gestures to a selection of teas, each neatly labeled with a premium price.
events.description_zh:
你不知怎么晃进了一个灯光昏暗的小棚屋，发现里面的空间感觉非常和平，四周摆满了种类繁多的茶叶。
屋子里面的男人做出手势，让你去看一批茶叶，每一种都有雅致的标签告知你茶叶的高昂价格。
events.description_plain:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.
The man inside gestures to a selection of teas, each neatly labeled with a premium price.
events.description_plain_en:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.
The man inside gestures to a selection of teas, each neatly labeled with a premium price.

屋子里面的男人做出手势，让你去看一批茶叶，每一种都有雅致的标签告知你茶叶的高昂价格。

options.title: Bone Tea
options.description: Pay 50 Gold. At the start of the next combat, Upgrade your starting hand.
options.description_en: Pay 50 Gold. At the start of the next combat, Upgrade your starting hand.
options.description_zh: 支付50金币。在你接下来的战斗开始时，升级你的初始手牌。

options.title: Ember Tea
options.description: Pay 150 Gold. At the start of the next 5 combats, gain 2 Strength.
options.description_en: Pay 150 Gold. At the start of the next 5 combats, gain 2 Strength.
options.description_zh: 支付150金币。在接下来5场战斗开始时，获得2点力量。

options.title: Tea of Discourtesy
options.description: At the start of the next combat, shuffle 2 Dazed into your Draw Pile.
options.description_en: At the start of the next combat, shuffle 2 Dazed into your Draw Pile.
options.description_zh: 在下一场战斗开始时，将2张晕眩放入你的抽牌堆。

events.title: The Future of Potions?
events.description:
You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus!
It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet.
The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?
events.description_en:
You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus!
It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet.
The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?
events.description_zh:
转过拐角，你感受到一阵轻微的轰鸣，随后发现了一台巨大的旋转装置！
它带有几个槽位，似乎能将液体转化为高度压缩的易消化药片。
将这些药水炼成一小片的想法令人有些不适，但或许尝试新事物也不错？
events.description_plain:

options.title: Insert any Potion
options.description: Lose a Potion. Obtain an Upgraded any Potion.
options.description_en: Lose a Potion. Obtain an Upgraded any Potion.
options.description_zh: 失去一瓶药水。获得一张升级过的任意药水牌。

events.title: The Lantern Key
events.description:
You come upon a faintly glowing key and go to pick it up.
“Been looking all over for that key! Now if you don't mind...”
 This person looks like bad news but maybe it's not good to be judgy.
events.description_en:
You come upon a faintly glowing key and go to pick it up.
“Been looking all over for that key! Now if you don't mind...”
 This person looks like bad news but maybe it's not good to be judgy.
events.description_zh:
你发现了一把发出微光的钥匙，于是将它捡了起来。
“我找这把钥匙可把这里翻了个遍！你要是不介意的话……”
这家伙看起来不是什么好人，但或许你也不该以貌取人。
events.description_plain:

“Been looking all over for that key! Now if you don't mind...”
 This person looks like bad news but maybe it's not good to be judgy.

options.title: Keep the Key
options.description: Fight to obtain the Key.
options.description_en: Fight to obtain the Key.
options.description_zh: 战斗来取得钥匙。

options.title: Return the Key
options.description: Gain 100 Gold.
options.description_en: Gain 100 Gold.
options.description_zh: 获得100金币。

events.title: The Legends Were True
events.description:
Entering into a pitch dark chamber, a sudden light pierces the darkness from above, just as the door slams behind you.
Illuminated before you appears to be a podium with a map on it. You feel compelled to take it.
Suspicious.
events.description_en:
Entering into a pitch dark chamber, a sudden light pierces the darkness from above, just as the door slams behind you.
Illuminated before you appears to be a podium with a map on it. You feel compelled to take it.
Suspicious.
events.description_zh:
踏入漆黑的密室，一道亮光从上方刺破黑暗，与此同时，身后的门砰然关上。
借着光亮，你看到前方的石台上放着一张地图。你有一种强烈的想要拿走它的冲动。
事出反常。
events.description_plain:
Entering into a pitch dark chamber, a sudden light pierces the darkness from above, just as the door slams behind you.
Illuminated before you appears to be a podium with a map on it. You feel compelled to take it.
Suspicious.

事出反常。

options.title: Nab the Map
options.description: Receive the Spoils Map.
options.description_en: Receive the Spoils Map.
options.description_zh: 获得藏宝图。

options.title: Slowly Find an Exit
options.description: Lose 8 HP. Procure 1 random Potion.
options.description_en: Lose 8 HP. Procure 1 random Potion.
options.description_zh: 失去8点生命。获得1瓶随机药水。

events.title: This or That?
events.description:
Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a suspicious bag of riches and a clearly cursed relic.
“This... or That?”
a scratched-up voice whispers from below.
events.description_en:
Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a suspicious bag of riches and a clearly cursed relic.
“This... or That?”
a scratched-up voice whispers from below.
events.description_zh:
附近的一个坑洞里突然蹿出一双手臂，一只手紧握着一袋可疑的财宝，另一只则拿着一件明显被诅咒的遗物。
“这个……还是那个？”
一个嘶哑的声音从地下传来，向你低语。
events.description_plain:
Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a suspicious bag of riches and a clearly cursed relic.
“This... or That?”
a scratched-up voice whispers from below.
events.description_plain_en:
Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a suspicious bag of riches and a clearly cursed relic.
“This... or That?”
a scratched-up voice whispers from below.

“这个……还是那个？”
一个嘶哑的声音从地下传来，向你低语。

options.title: That
options.description: Add Clumsy to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_en: Add Clumsy to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_zh: 将一张笨拙加入你的牌组。获得一件随机遗物。

options.title: This
options.description: Lose 6 HP. Gain 41–68 Gold.
options.description_en: Lose 6 HP. Gain 41–68 Gold.
options.description_zh: 失去6点生命。获得41–68金币。

events.title: Tinker Time
events.description:
Navigating through an endless sea of corpses, you find a mad scientist scavenging for various scraps.
“Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next atrocity device! How about it?”
events.description_en:
Navigating through an endless sea of corpses, you find a mad scientist scavenging for various scraps.
“Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next atrocity device! How about it?”
events.description_zh:
你在翻越数不尽的尸山血海之时，遇到了一位正在搜寻破烂的疯狂科学家。
“是的，嗨，你好！你看起来是个有实力的战士……我的下一件暴行装备正需要一个测试员！你觉得怎么样？”
events.description_plain:
Navigating through an endless sea of corpses, you find a mad scientist scavenging for various scraps.
“Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next atrocity device! How about it?”

options.title: Accept
options.description: Create a custom card to add to your Deck.
options.description_en: Create a custom card to add to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 制作一张定制卡牌加入你的牌组。

events.title: Trash Heap
events.description:
You discover a towering pile of scrapped weapons, discarded trinkets, and other oddities. The massive pile shifts and rumbles, as if growing from within...
If you scavenge from the surface, you may find some decent things. But if you really get in there, you may find some exotic treasures.
events.description_en:
You discover a towering pile of scrapped weapons, discarded trinkets, and other oddities. The massive pile shifts and rumbles, as if growing from within...
If you scavenge from the surface, you may find some decent things. But if you really get in there, you may find some exotic treasures.
events.description_zh:
你发现了一座如山般堆积的垃圾，里面有着废旧武器、遗弃饰品和众多其他古怪玩意儿。垃圾堆摇摆晃动着，仿佛正在从内部不断生长变大……
如果你从表面搜索，应该能找到一些好东西。但如果你努努力扎进垃圾堆里面，那就能找到一些奇珍异宝。
events.description_plain:
You discover a towering pile of scrapped weapons, discarded trinkets, and other oddities. The massive pile shifts and rumbles, as if growing from within...
If you scavenge from the surface, you may find some decent things. But if you really get in there, you may find some exotic treasures.
