options.title: Dive In
options.description: Lose 8 HP. Obtain a random forgotten Relic from the past.
options.description_en: Lose 8 HP. Obtain a random forgotten Relic from the past.
options.description_zh: 失去8点生命。获得一件被遗忘的旧日遗物。

options.title: Grab Random Junk
options.description: Gain 100 Gold. Obtain a random forgotten card from the past.
options.description_en: Gain 100 Gold. Obtain a random forgotten card from the past.
options.description_zh: 获得100金币。获得一张被遗忘的旧日卡牌。

events.title: The Trial
events.description:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.
As you pass under a golden archway, horns blare, confetti explodes, and streamers glide down from the ceiling!
“Entrant ???, you are the DECIDER for today's Trial.”
events.description_en:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.
As you pass under a golden archway, horns blare, confetti explodes, and streamers glide down from the ceiling!
“Entrant ???, you are the DECIDER for today's Trial.”
events.description_zh:
你排起队，和众人一起进入一栋巨大的建筑物。
当你通过一道金色的拱门时，突然号角响起、彩纸爆裂飞散、天花板上还飞出了众多彩条！
“???号进入者，你将成为今天审判的判决者。”
events.description_plain:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.
As you pass under a golden archway, horns blare, confetti explodes, and streamers glide down from the ceiling!
“Entrant ???, you are the DECIDER for today's Trial.”
events.description_plain_en:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.
As you pass under a golden archway, horns blare, confetti explodes, and streamers glide down from the ceiling!
“Entrant ???, you are the DECIDER for today's Trial.”
events.description_plain_zh:
你排起队，和众人一起进入一栋巨大的建筑物。
当你通过一道金色的拱门时，突然号角响起、彩纸爆裂飞散、天花板上还飞出了众多彩条！
“???号进入者，你将成为今天审判的判决者。”

options.title: Accept
options.description: Serve as today's Decider.
options.description_en: Serve as today's Decider.
options.description_zh: 担当今天的判决者

options.title: Reject
options.description: You are not allowed to Reject.
options.description_en: You are not allowed to Reject.
options.description_zh: 拒绝是不被允许的。

events.title: Unrest Site
events.description:
You find a secluded Rest Site and start a fire to get some rest.
Or so you thought.
Once the fire is started, it begins to swell, reaching not upwards but sideways towards a grove of oil-seeping trees.
Should you try resting anyways?
events.description_en:
You find a secluded Rest Site and start a fire to get some rest.
Or so you thought.
Once the fire is started, it begins to swell, reaching not upwards but sideways towards a grove of oil-seeping trees.
Should you try resting anyways?
events.description_zh:
你找到了一个隔绝的休息处，于是点起篝火打算休息。
结果只是打算而已。
篝火点起后，火光立即胀大起来，不是向上而是向着侧面延伸向一片满是冒油树木的林地。
要不要不管这个情况，就这么继续休息？
events.description_plain:
You find a secluded Rest Site and start a fire to get some rest.
Or so you thought.
Once the fire is started, it begins to swell, reaching not upwards but sideways towards a grove of oil-seeping trees.
Should you try resting anyways?

You find a secluded Rest Site and start a fire to get some rest.
Or so you thought.
Once the fire is started, it begins to swell, reaching not upwards but sideways towards a grove of oil-seeping trees.
Should you try resting anyways?
events.description_plain_zh:
你找到了一个隔绝的休息处，于是点起篝火打算休息。
结果只是打算而已。
篝火点起后，火光立即胀大起来，不是向上而是向着侧面延伸向一片满是冒油树木的林地。
要不要不管这个情况，就这么继续休息？

options.title: Kill the Trees
options.description: Lose 8 Max HP. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_en: Lose 8 Max HP. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_zh: 失去8点最大生命。获得一件随机遗物。

options.title: Rest Anyways
options.description: Heal to full HP. Receive Poor Sleep.
options.description_en: Heal to full HP. Receive Poor Sleep.
options.description_zh: 回复全部生命值。获得睡眠不佳。

events.title: War Historian, Repy
events.description:
An academic is trapped in a hanging cage next to a treasure chest.
The academic is muttering about “One-Time-Use Keys” while furiously writing something.
Looks like you can unlock the cage or the chest.
events.description_en:
An academic is trapped in a hanging cage next to a treasure chest.
The academic is muttering about “One-Time-Use Keys” while furiously writing something.
Looks like you can unlock the cage or the chest.
events.description_zh:
你看到一个学者被关在一个吊在空中的笼子里，而旁边有一个大宝箱。
那个学者一边咕哝着什么“一次性的钥匙”，一边拼命地在写着些什么。
看起来你可以二选一，要么打开笼子，要么打开宝箱。
events.description_plain:

The academic is muttering about “One-Time-Use Keys” while furiously writing something.
Looks like you can unlock the cage or the chest.

options.title: Unlock the Cage
options.description: Lose Lantern Key. Obtain History Course.
options.description_en: Lose Lantern Key. Obtain History Course.
options.description_zh: 失去灯火钥匙。获得历史课。

options.title: Unlock the Chest
options.description: Lose Lantern Key. Procure 2 random Potions. Obtain 2 random Relics.
options.description_en: Lose Lantern Key. Procure 2 random Potions. Obtain 2 random Relics.
options.description_zh: 失去灯火钥匙。获得2瓶随机药水和2件随机遗物。

events.title: Waterlogged Scriptorium
events.description:
Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a withered figure working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are stuffed full of damp scrolls and parchment.
Noticing a patron has entered, the scribe-shopkeeper snaps to attention and gestures at some implements arranged on a desk.
events.description_en:
Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a withered figure working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are stuffed full of damp scrolls and parchment.
Noticing a patron has entered, the scribe-shopkeeper snaps to attention and gestures at some implements arranged on a desk.
events.description_zh:
在昏暗的通道中前行时，你找到了一个小店，里面有一个憔悴的员工。四周的书架上塞满了无数潮湿的卷轴与羊皮纸。
抄写员兼店主注意到有客人进店，猛地回过神来，为你指了指书桌上摆放着的一些器具。

Noticing a patron has entered, the scribe-shopkeeper snaps to attention and gestures at some implements arranged on a desk.

options.title: Bloody Ink
options.description: Gain 6 Max HP.
options.description_en: Gain 6 Max HP.
options.description_zh: 获得6点最大生命。

options.title: Prickly Sponge
options.description: Pay 155 Gold. Enchant 2 cards with Steady.
options.description_en: Pay 155 Gold. Enchant 2 cards with Steady.
options.description_zh: 支付155金币。给2张牌附魔：稳定。

options.title: Tentacle Quill
options.description: Pay 65 Gold. Enchant a card with Steady.
options.description_en: Pay 65 Gold. Enchant a card with Steady.
options.description_zh: 支付65金币。给一张牌附魔：稳定。

events.title: Welcome to Wongo's
events.description:
“Welcome to Wongo's. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices.” says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met.
“Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo's,” they continue, without even looking up.
events.description_en:
“Welcome to Wongo's. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices.” says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met.
“Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo's,” they continue, without even looking up.
events.description_zh:
“欢迎来到旺购百货，这里有超旺商品，一定让您越购越旺。”店员说着欢迎词，看起来没有丝毫热情。
“请随意查看我们的商品，祝您在旺购过得愉快。”店员头也不抬地继续说着。

options.title: Wongo's Bargain Bin
options.description: Pay 100 Gold. Obtain 1 random Common Relic.
options.description_en: Pay 100 Gold. Obtain 1 random Common Relic.
options.description_zh: 支付100金币。获得1件随机普通遗物。

options.title: Wongo's Featured Item
options.description: Pay 200 Gold. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_en: Pay 200 Gold. Obtain a random Relic.
options.description_zh: 支付200金币。获得一件随机遗物。

options.title: Leave
options.description: Downgrade a random card.
options.description_en: Downgrade a random card.
options.description_zh: 随机降级一张牌。

options.title: Wongo's Mystery Box
options.description: Pay 300 Gold. Obtain 3 random Relics after 5 combats.
options.description_en: Pay 300 Gold. Obtain 3 random Relics after 5 combats.
options.description_zh: 支付300金币。在5场战斗后获得3个随机遗物。

events.title: Wellspring
events.description:
You trace a low rumble to its source and find yourself captivated by a tranquil wellspring. The water is an emerald green with clusters of glowing motes.
It looks inviting. What can possibly go wrong?
events.description_en:
You trace a low rumble to its source and find yourself captivated by a tranquil wellspring. The water is an emerald green with clusters of glowing motes.
It looks inviting. What can possibly go wrong?
events.description_zh:
你跟着一阵低沉的轰鸣声找到了源头：居然是一处平静的泉水，让你心生向往。泉水绿如碧玉，你还能从中看见一些发光的尘埃。
看起来十分诱人，这不可能出什么差错的吧？
events.description_plain:

It looks inviting. What can possibly go wrong?

options.title: Bathe
options.description: Remove 1 card from your Deck. Add 1 Guilty to your Deck.
options.description_en: Remove 1 card from your Deck. Add 1 Guilty to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 从你的牌组中移除1张牌。将1张愧疚添加到你的牌组。

options.title: Bottle
options.description: Procure 1 random Potion.
options.description_en: Procure 1 random Potion.
options.description_zh: 获得1瓶随机药水。

events.title: Whispering Hollow
events.description:
Making your way through a hollow of dead trees you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs.
Such a creepy tree. It whispers.
...make exchange.....
events.description_en:
Making your way through a hollow of dead trees you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs.
Such a creepy tree. It whispers.
...make exchange.....
events.description_zh:
在通过一个枯木林谷时，你遇见了一株孤单的白骨般的树。它的枝丫如同肋骨般向内弯曲，枝条上则挂着黏土般的球状物体。
真是棵瘆人的树。它还在发出低语：
…来做交易…..

Such a creepy tree. It whispers.
...make exchange.....

options.title: Exchange Gold
options.description: Lose 50 Gold. Procure 2 random Potions.
options.description_en: Lose 50 Gold. Procure 2 random Potions.
options.description_zh: 失去50金币。获得2瓶随机药水。

options.title: Hug the Tree
options.description: Lose 9 HP. Choose a card to Transform.
options.description_en: Lose 9 HP. Choose a card to Transform.
options.description_zh: 失去9点生命。选择一张牌变化。

events.title: Wood Carvings
events.description:
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:
A bird, snake, and... a torus?
A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?
events.description_en:
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:
A bird, snake, and... a torus?
A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?
events.description_zh:
你打开一个尘封的盒子，发现里面有一组3个相当精细的木雕：
一只鸟、一条蛇、还有……一个圆环？
附近有一个基座，上面的凹陷痕迹正与这些木雕底部的形状吻合。你要把哪个木雕放在基座上呢？

options.title: Bird
options.description: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into Peck.
options.description_en: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into Peck.
options.description_zh: 选择1张初始牌变化为啄击。

options.title: Snake
options.description: Enchant 1 card with Slither.
options.description_en: Enchant 1 card with Slither.
options.description_zh: 给1张牌附魔：蛇行。

options.title: Torus
options.description: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into Toric Toughness.
options.description_en: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into Toric Toughness.
options.description_zh: 选择1张初始牌变化为坚韧之环。

events.title: Zen Weaver
events.description:
You walk through a spider web and PANIC!
But then, a wave of calm washes over you...
“Calm down. I need you to quit fussing up my web.”
How did you calm down so quickly?
An itsy bitsy spider abseils down to meet you. It seems willing to impart some techniques for gold.
events.description_en:
You walk through a spider web and PANIC!
But then, a wave of calm washes over you...
“Calm down. I need you to quit fussing up my web.”
How did you calm down so quickly?
An itsy bitsy spider abseils down to meet you. It seems willing to impart some techniques for gold.
events.description_zh:
你在行走时撞到了一张蜘蛛网，立即慌了神！
可是很快，一阵平静的感觉席卷了你……
“冷静下来，我需要你不再弄坏我的网。”
你怎么会这么快就冷静下来的呢？
一只小之又小的蜘蛛沿着丝线降落下来与你问好，它看起来愿意收取一些金币来分享它的部分技术。

options.title: Arachnid Acupuncture
options.description: Pay 250 Gold. Remove 2 cards from your Deck.
options.description_en: Pay 250 Gold. Remove 2 cards from your Deck.
options.description_zh: 支付250金币。从你的牌组中移除2张牌。

options.title: Breathing Techniques
options.description: Pay 50 Gold. Add 2 Enlightenment to your Deck.
options.description_en: Pay 50 Gold. Add 2 Enlightenment to your Deck.
options.description_zh: 支付50金币。将2张开悟加入到你的牌组。

options.title: Emotional Awareness
options.description: Pay 125 Gold. Remove 1 card from your Deck.
options.description_en: Pay 125 Gold. Remove 1 card from your Deck.
options.description_zh: 支付125金币。从你的牌组中移除1张牌。

options.title: Locked
options.description: Not enough Gold.
options.description_en: Not enough Gold.
options.description_zh: 金币不足。
